body_txt: The butt-based equivalent of Big-Breast Pride , this trope is about characters who take pride in their large backsides. Some cultures and individuals consider big butts attractive, so it's only natural that some fictional characters consider having one a source of pride. These types of characters are typically female, though male examples aren't unheard of. Despite the implicit nature of this trope, this is more often Played for Laughs . Such as showing a Big Fun character proudly shaking their large-ass... ass , or having a comedic character who's obsessed with their butt. Often, these characters aren't conventionally attractive to add to the humor. This especially holds true in low brow comedies, where butt jokes are common, and thus characters who express this trope follow. Indeed, proper fanservice use is actually fairly niche, starting to appear sparingly in the 2000s, and becoming more common from then on; despite the ass always having been considered sexual. Whether this stems from changing beauty standards or because focus on the ass seems more overt than focus on the breasts or muscles is debatable. Either way, it's still not uncommon for this trope to be played for laughs still anyway, such as having a vain character comment on their ass in an unfitting situation . These types of characters can show their pride in multiple ways. They could verbally boast about it, sometimes comparing themselves favorably to those less blessed than them. They might wear clothing that emphasizes their behind such as tight pants, pencil skirts, short shorts, or thongs and similar Barely There Swimwear . They also might draw attention to it via various actions such as Shaking the Rump , flaunting it at people they are sexually/romantically interested in , or spanking themselves to emphasize their buttocks. Particularly shameless characters may go so far as to expose their derrière on a whim to disapproving (or approving ) onlookers. Can overlap with Proud Beauty . May be subject to the Joke of the Butt . Might possess a Comically Oversized Butt , an Impossible Hourglass Figure , or Hartman Hips . Compare Big Beautiful Woman and Fat and Proud . Compare Nobody Touches the Hair and Bigger Is Better in Bed for other tropes about characters being proud of body parts. Stuffy Old Songs About the Buttocks might have women be this. Can be used for butt-related Fanservice or Fan Disservice . Contrast Baby Don't Got Back , for when someone feels ashamed for having a smaller butt.
